title: zanthoxylum fagara
intro: Zanthoxylum fagara, also known as the prickly ash or southern prickly ash, is a small deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum fagara include relieving digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
